title: oldenlandia corymbosa var. linearis
intro: Oldenlandia corymbosa var. linearis, also known as "Ding Xue Teng" in Chinese, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia corymbosa var. linearis include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as cough and sore throat. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, decoction, or tincture, where it is combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
